identity_baseline: A group of four unnamed Zodangan military soldiers.
stable_visual_summary: A group of four unnamed soldiers belonging to the Zodangan military. They are characterized by their standard Zodangan military uniforms and armor, serving as a cohesive unit of armored guardsmen. In their final appearance, they are depicted as fallen warriors following combat with John Carter.
costume_signature: Standard Zodangan military uniform and armor.
relationship_notes: Killed in combat by John Carter
continuity_constraints: Must consist of exactly four individuals as per the source text.
Uniforms must adhere to the Zodangan military aesthetic.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific visual details of the armor design are not provided.
Physical characteristics (age, build) of the individual soldiers are unknown.
